LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_THE_SPECTRE.title: Sentret, Mild, Future
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_THE_SPECTRE.pages.INITI:
Your consciousness ascends into the cosmos. In a haze, you see the planet you came from beneath your feet, while an [gold]utterly incongruous[/gold] red arrow points at an [gold]utterly incongruous[/gold] red circle.

It seems to be some kind of guidance, suggesting you will find something [red]peculiar[/red] here.
Ah, I can't even think of it.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_THE_SPECTRE.pages.KITTE:
I SEE YOU 

So it said. In your trance, you can't tell if you spoke because you saw the kitten, or if the kitten is watching you. 

Take it with you, you think.

Even if this act seems [gold]shameful[/gold].
But if you remain steadfast, prove yourself, live, love, tell lies...
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_THE_SPECTRE.pages.STOP_:
[jitter][red]Don't show me this anymore!!![/red][/jitter]
[jitter][red]I'm tired of seeing it!![/red][/jitter]

[jitter][red]Ah, I can't even think of it!!![/red][/jitter]
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_THE_GREAT_SEAL.title: The Great Seal
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_THE_GREAT_SEAL.pages.IN:
Before you, a figure clad in black with blue hair like a phantom and a [gold]mysterious giant humanoid[/gold] guard something shimmering, blocking your path.

[jitter][red]Inexplicable whispers[/red][/jitter] echo in your mind.
[sine]"Hamood... Hamood... Hamood's Habibi..."[/sine]

[sine]"Hamood's Habibi..."[/sine]
[jitter][red]"Hamood's Habibi..."[/red][/jitter]

Countless messages flood your mind. The luminous humanoid and blue-haired phantom are still before you.
The whispers won't fade, your thoughts grow hazy, and amid the chaos, what you make out is...
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_THE_GREAT_SEAL.pages.OP:
"Ha——! Mood——! You'll be fine!!!"
You shout the words from your mind. Before you appears a dark half-bodied thing desperately protecting a [green]greenish lump[/green].
Then, in a flash, the dark figure personally slays the greenish lump.
After that, the dark silhouette and the green figure flicker in and out.

When you come to, the luminous giant humanoid has vanished, leaving only two [gold]precious artifacts[/gold] on the ground.

Perhaps you [red]shouldn't have done that[/red].

"Hamood, get out of here or I'll annihilate your grandma grandpa!"
"Hamood's Great Shadowless Kick!"
"Ah Arashi Storm, even Hamood can be killed!!!"

You see a pool of blood, a pink-haired person lying in it. A small thing leaps from her arms, launching a devastating [red]great flying kick[/red] at you.

You are badly hurt, but the small thing is [gold]at the end of its rope[/gold].
You draw the blade on your back—though you don't know where it came from—and mercilessly cut it down.

The whispers cease completely. The giant luminous humanoid seems even brighter. Your mind feels much lighter.

[sine][purple]"Hamood's Habibi..."[/purple][/sine]
[sine][green]"Hamood's Habibi..."[/green][/sine]
[sine][blue]"Hamood's Habibi..."[/blue][/sine]
[sine][pink]"Hamood's Habibi..."[/pink][/sine]
[sine][red]"Hamood's Habibi..."[/red][/sine]

[jitter][red]Ha[/red] [green]mood[/green] [blue]ged[/blue] [purple]don[/purple] !!![/jitter]

It won't... go away...
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_DRINK.title: Thirsty
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_DRINK.pages.INITIAL.des: You find a spring. [jitter][red]Suddenly stricken with a violent urge[/red][/jitter], you feel incredibly thirsty and must drink immediately.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_DRINK.pages.DRINK_OR_LE:
You feel better.

But there's still some spring water left. Maybe...?
You drink again, feeling even better.

[jitter][red]Still not finished!!![/red][/jitter]
Recover [green]{Heal}[/green] HP, remove [gold]{RandomCard}[/gold]. {Possibility}% chance to finish.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_DRINK.pages.LEAVE1.desc: You decide not to drink and turn away.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_DRINK.pages.LEAVE2.desc: The spring water is finally finished. Nothing remains here.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_MAN_YU_DIAN.title: Eel Restaurant
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_MAN_YU_DIAN.pages.INITI:
You find a scroll on the ground with writing on it.
You feel an [gold]overwhelming urge to speak up.[/gold]

When you come to, you're in a restaurant, sitting at a table.
Though the boss and landlady seem off, you realize "Eel Restaurant" means [red]a restaurant run by eels[/red]. But now they're asking if you want to order something.
Pay [gold]220[/gold] gold, obtain [gold]Raw Power[/gold], recover [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_MAN_YU_DIAN.pages.FIGHT:
You decide not to do business with these eels and attack the landlady.
[jitter][red]The Eel Restaurant boss immediately rushes forward[/red][/jitter], shielding the landlady and fighting you desperately.

In the chaos, you grab a bottle of Florida Water.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_MAN_YU_DIAN.pages.YUAN_:
It's a bit pricey but delicious. You eat your fill.

You also feel [gold]brimming with power[/gold], with a sudden urge to smash rocks.
LEX_NINJA2_EVENT_MAN_YU_DIAN.pages.LEAVE:
You decide not to eat and turn away.

The infuriated landlady does something to you. You keep feeling like something you can't swat is constantly buzzing in your ear.
